description_long: This is an old, thick, and weathered book with a dark, worn leather cover and visible hand-stitched binding along the spine. The pages are uneven, crumpled, and yellowed with age, some protruding irregularly from the sides, giving the book a rugged and antique appearance. The stitching is prominent, with thick threads or cords running vertically along the spine and some loose ends visible. The book sits atop a flat, brown base, which may be a display stand. There are no visible illustrations, text, or decorative elements on the cover or spine, and the surface of the cover is plain and textured. The overall look suggests a handmade or historical manuscript, possibly of significant age and use.
description: A thick, antique book with a dark, worn leather cover, hand-stitched binding, and heavily aged, crumpled pages. The book has a rugged, historical appearance with no visible illustrations or text.
description_view_0: The front cover and the uneven, protruding pages are visible, with some stitching and loose threads apparent along the side.
description_view_1: The spine is clearly visible, showing thick, hand-stitched cords and the layered, aged pages tightly bound together.
description_view_2: The back cover and more of the crumpled, yellowed pages are visible, with the book's thickness and irregular edges emphasized.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the book reveals more of the layered, wrinkled pages and a plain, dark cover with no visible markings.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark brown with prominent hand-stitched cords and no visible text or decorative elements.
